title: Clean Dark UI (1.19.4 OUT NOW)
description:
The UI made clean and dark. (Heavily inspired by the unreleased Bedrock Edition UI)

Now works with the new 1.19.4 inventory.
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/4k0Ah2e.png)
## The pack that every Minecraft player needs
If you are like me you hate how bright and ugly the UI in Minecraft is. Just opening a chest is basically getting flashbanged..

But fear no more because our saviour Clean Dark UI is here!!

This pack is heavily inspired by the unreleased Bedrock Edition UI
![](https://s5.gifyu.com/images/slideshow_AdobeExpress-2.gif) A better life is just one click away!

By downloading the product you agree with the terms and conditions. We can't promise your life will improve when using this product.
